meaning: n.N 字,半方 prep.<法>在,在...中
examples: We stopped for a picnic en route.
The bus broke down en route from Boston to New York.
They have arrived in London en route to the United States.
Ha mostrado un compromiso sin fallas en pro de la paz y el desarrollo.
If they passed through at all, it was en route elsewhere, clutching their wallets tightly.
